description_long: This is a rectangular, vertically-oriented video game box with a predominantly white background and bold, colorful artwork on the front. The front cover features a dynamic illustration of a muscular figure in a green tank top, energetically interacting with large, blocky shapes reminiscent of video game graphics, set against a red, striped background. The box is labeled for the Atari 2600 system, with branding and game information clearly visible on the front, spine, and back. The back cover displays a screenshot of the game interface, descriptive text, and technical details, all framed by a clean, modern layout. The spines are white with vertical orange and pink text, and the bottom of the front cover includes a small publisher logo. The box appears to be made of glossy, coated cardboard, typical of vintage video game packaging.
description: A white, rectangular Atari 2600 video game box with vibrant, action-packed cover art and bold, colorful text. The box features detailed illustrations and branding on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main cover art with a muscular figure, colorful block shapes, and prominent branding and title text.
description_view_1: The left spine view displays vertical orange and pink text with the Atari logo at the bottom, set against a plain white background.
description_view_2: The back view features a screenshot of the game, descriptive text, and technical details, with the title repeated at the top.
description_view_3: The right spine view mirrors the left, with vertical orange and pink text and a clean white background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized, action-packed illustration of a muscular person in a green tank top, energetically reaching out toward large, three-dimensional, block-like shapes. The background is composed of dynamic red and orange stripes, giving a sense of movement and excitement. The overall style is bold and colorful, reminiscent of classic arcade game artwork.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with vertically oriented orange 'ATARI' text and pink 'stepbeats' text, both in bold, modern fonts. The Atari logo appears at the bottom, and the design is clean and minimalistic.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, black Atari logo is visible at the bottom of the front cover and spine, featuring the classic Atari symbol with three upward-curving lines.
